framework_name: Gautam Baid - The Joys of Compounding

negative_indicators: Blaming external factors for internal failures

positive_indicators: Prudent share buybacks at discounts to intrinsic value
Low base salary with high performance-based stock hurdles
negative_indicators: Excessive executive compensation unrelated to performance

financial_tests.one_dollar_test: For every dollar of retained earnings, has the company created at least one dollar of market value?
financial_tests.owner_earnings: Net Income + Depreciation/Amortization - Maintenance Capex. Does the business generate true distributable cash?
financial_tests.capex_efficiency: Distinction between Growth Capex (moat widening) and Maintenance Capex (running to stay in place).

qualitative_factors.pricing_power: Ability to raise prices without significant loss of market share (Consumer Monopolies).

scorecard_type.inner_scorecard: Focus on internal standards, long-term value creation, and integrity.
scorecard_type.outer_scorecard: Focus on Wall Street validation, short-term earnings beats, and public image.

behavioral_guardrails.description: Overweighting vivid, recent info like a single bad earnings report.
behavioral_guardrails.guardrail: Perform 'outside view' analysis; check historical base rates; block trade if the long-term thesis is intact despite short-term noise.

behavioral_guardrails.description: Cutting the flowers and watering the weeds (selling winners too early).
behavioral_guardrails.guardrail: Evaluate portfolio on total wealth %; force hold if intrinsic value is growing regardless of mental profit status.

behavioral_guardrails.description: Churning the portfolio during volatility just to feel in control.
behavioral_guardrails.guardrail: Mandatory 'cooling-off period'; verify if action is fundamental or emotional; default to inactivity.

behavioral_guardrails.description: Focusing on the original purchase price rather than current earning power.
behavioral_guardrails.guardrail: Mentally 'liquidate' daily; ask: 'Would I buy this at today's price?'; use reverse DCF to ignore cost basis.

behavioral_guardrails.description: Rotating from boring compounders to chase hot fads (FOMO).
behavioral_guardrails.guardrail: Isolate decision from peer performance; flag trades for 'Envy/FOMO' if selling quality for unverified momentum.

behavioral_guardrails.description: Punishing a company for short-term earnings hits taken to build long-term moats.
behavioral_guardrails.guardrail: Assess 'Capacity to Suffer'; if earnings are depressed due to high-ROI R&D/Capex, extend evaluation horizon to 5–7 years.
